I found a dental appointment in your calendar — details below. Which way would you like me to reschedule it?

Current appointment
- Title: Dentist Appointment
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Event ID: 5

Quick questions so I can proceed:
1. Is this the appointment you want rescheduled? (Yes / No)
2. What new date and start time do you want? (Please give a specific date and time, e.g., “2024-05-22 at 09:30”.)
   - If you don’t have a specific time, I can:
     a) Propose three alternative slots in the next two weeks, or
     b) Find the next available weekday morning/afternoon slot — tell me which you prefer.
3. Keep the same duration (1 hour)? (Yes / No — if No, tell me the desired end time or duration.)
4. Notify participants when I reschedule? (Default is yes; this event only lists you as a participant.)

Reply with your choices and I’ll reschedule it for you.
